args.query: SELECT p.Id AS ProductId, p.Name AS ProductName, oi.OrderId, o.EffectiveDate FROM OrderItem oi JOIN "Order" o ON oi.OrderId = o.Id JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE lower(trim(p.Name)) LIKE '%ai processing unit%' AND date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30' AND replace(trim(o.AccountId),'#','') = replace(trim('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'),'#','');

exec_args.sql: SELECT p.Id AS ProductId, p.Name AS ProductName, oi.OrderId, o.EffectiveDate FROM OrderItem oi JOIN "Order" o ON oi.OrderId = o.Id JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE lower(trim(p.Name)) LIKE '%ai processing unit%' AND date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30' AND replace(trim(o.AccountId),'#','') = replace(trim('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'),'#','');

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id FROM "Order" WHERE replace(trim(AccountId),'#','') = replace(trim('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'),'#','');

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id FROM "Order" WHERE replace(trim(AccountId),'#','') = replace(trim('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'),'#','');

args.query: SELECT oi.Id AS OrderItemId, oi.OrderId, oi.Product2Id, oi.Quantity, oi.UnitPrice, oi.PriceBookEntryId, p.Name FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE oi.OrderId = '801Wt00000PHRYWIA5';
